metadata.note: Standalone atomic (no theater) covering the whole SCS dispute: claims, law, incidents, features and external-power presence. Archetype A2 (anchor == subject): the sea's name and its feature toponyms are near-perfect gates, so NO generic domain verbs (patrol, vessel, coast guard, water cannon, sovereignty) -- aliases are OR'd and a bare verb would leak across all China/US/ASEAN news. primary_target=null; centroid_ids stay {ASIA-CHINA, ASIA-SOUTHEAST, AMERICAS-USA}. Audited against 365d of real headlines 2026-07-16. DROPPED with cause: 'CCG' (7/8 were Diaoyu Dao + east-of-Taiwan -> japan_china_theater leak), 'UNCLOS' (2/3 were the Thailand-Cambodia MOU44 dispute), 'arbitral' (2/3 were Botafogo football arbitration), 'Subi' (109 hits, all Mitsubishi/subida), 'Meiji' (Japanese era/company), 'Sierra Madre' (mountain range; gate includes AMERICAS-USA), 'Taiping' (generic Chinese toponym), 'freedom of navigation'/'Nimitz'/'George Washington'/'Ronald Reagan' (Hormuz + Caribbean + the presidents). CRITICAL: bare zh '南海' is EXCLUDED -- it matches Japanese 南海トラフ (Nankai Trough megaquake) and 南海フェリー; the CJK corpus is 99.7% Japanese (Asahi), so the collision is live, not theoretical (rule 6b).

bundle.term: The sea itself (core anchor, all scripts)
Scarborough Shoal and its claimant names
Paracel Islands, Pratas, Macclesfield and other banks
Adjacent disputed waters within the basin

Claimant maritime agencies and the PH-US exercise
